title: LilacSweet GUI
description: A complete GUI transformation in serene lilac. Full extension of the my [SweetSweet HUD!]
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/215d886d4dc0da33151a309900ec0f32302c5937.png) *** ### **Related projects:** ✦-๑┆ ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5150a5e8ff70946bddcf735276f9fa1ef3cc73d.png) [SweetSweet HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sweet-sweet-hud) ┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦┆ ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd5d91f991a9421c71d9e0655902b262ec3f73e7.png) [PinkSweet GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pinksweet-gui) ┆๑-✦
*** ### **Features:** Complete GUI Overhaul: Every menu, inventory screen, and crafting interface has been redesigned with custom textures. Some interactive blocks have a special background, but the rest of the style only improves the vanilla windows of interactions and all that stuff This pack is designed as a direct upgrade. All the familiar elements from the HUD version (like health, armor, hunger, XP & hotbar) are included and perfectly matched to the new GUI style
｡ ₊°༺💜༻°₊ ｡
*** ### **Support & Contact:** Love this pack? Support me on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/reterica)!
For any questions or suggestions, reach me out via my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/QsezmMbPQF)
